home.subtitle: August 15, 2026
quotes: "No matter what you do, things will never be perfect." – Applejack
"Bad things happen, but that doesn't mean you should give up!" – Applejack
"It's not about pushing yourself, it's about pushing in the right direction." – Rainbow Dash
"Fear isn't scary — giving up is." – Princess Luna
"Everyone deserves to be forgiven at least once." – Princess Celestia
"You don't need to be perfect — just be yourself." – Starlight Glimmer
"Even when change is hard, it's still worth trying." – Sunset Shimmer
"Be true to yourself. Don't let others define you." – Rainbow Dash
"Smile! Things will get a little better!" – Pinkie Pie
"Honesty is the most important principle of all." – Applejack
"Kindness is stronger than any power." – Fluttershy
"Friendship isn't always easy, but it's worth protecting." – Twilight Sparkle
"A party is the best way to make friends!" – Pinkie Pie
